en.name: Binbin Lin
en.title: Associate Professor (Tianyou Distinguished Track)
en.affiliation: Faculty of Geomatics, Lanzhou Jiaotong University
en.research_keywords: Geospatial Big Data · Social Sensing · Public Health · Spatiotemporal Analysis and Modeling · GeoAI
en.bio: Dr. Binbin Lin is a Lecturer / Tianyou Associate Professor in the Department of Geographic Information Science, Faculty of Geomatics, Lanzhou Jiaotong University. Her research focuses on geospatial big data, social sensing, public health, spatiotemporal analysis and modeling, and geospatial artificial intelligence.

zh.name: 林彬彬
zh.title: 讲师（校聘天佑副教授）
zh.affiliation: 兰州交通大学 测绘与地理信息学院 地信系
zh.address: 甘肃省兰州市安宁西路88号
zh.research_keywords: 地理大数据 · 社会感知 · 公共健康 · 时空分析与建模 · 地理人工智能
zh.bio: 林彬彬，女，理学博士，兰州交通大学测绘与地理信息学院地信系教师，讲师（校聘天佑副教授）。主要从事地理大数据、社会感知、公共健康、时空分析与建模、地理人工智能等方向研究。

en.title: Profile
en.body: Dr. Lin studies how spatial data, human behavior, and public health systems interact across time and space. Her work integrates GIScience, GeoAI, mobile phone location data, social media data, spatial statistics, and machine learning to examine health inequality, healthcare accessibility, disaster disruption, social sensing, and urban resilience.

zh.title: 教师简介
zh.body: 林彬彬博士现为兰州交通大学测绘与地理信息学院地信系教师，讲师（校聘天佑副教授）。研究工作面向地理空间大数据与公共健康问题，综合运用GIScience、GeoAI、社会感知、手机位置数据、社交媒体数据、空间统计与机器学习方法，关注公共健康不平等、医疗可达性、灾害扰动、人群行为响应与城市韧性等议题。

en.title: Geospatial Big Data and GeoAI
en.text: Geospatial artificial intelligence, spatial machine learning, spatiotemporal modeling, and spatial decision support.

zh.title: 地理大数据与地理人工智能
zh.text: 围绕地理空间大数据组织、时空建模、GeoAI 方法与空间决策支持开展研究。

en.title: Public Health Geography
en.text: Healthcare accessibility, health inequality, mental health, occupational stress, and health system disruption.

zh.title: 公共健康与健康地理
zh.text: 关注医疗可达性、公共健康不平等、心理健康、职业压力以及扰动情境下的健康系统响应。

en.title: Social Sensing and Human Mobility
en.text: Social media, mobile phone location data, public sentiment, behavioral signals, and crisis response.

zh.title: 社会感知与人群流动
zh.text: 利用社交媒体、手机位置数据与行为感知数据，刻画公众情绪、出行行为与危机响应。

en.title: Disaster and Urban Resilience
en.text: Spatial exposure, vulnerability, recovery, adaptation, and resilience of cities and health systems.

zh.title: 灾害影响与城市韧性
zh.text: 研究灾害扰动下城市与健康系统的空间暴露、脆弱性、恢复、适应与韧性。

en.title: Publications
en.note: Publication information is kept in English for citation consistency.

zh.title: 论文论著
zh.note: 论文、会议论文和学术专著条目信息保留英文，便于引用、检索与国际交流。
